price_too_high.approach: Acknowledge first, then explain the 3-stage payment structure. Emphasize they only start with 20%. Focus on value and stress-free process.

thinking_about_it.approach: Respect their space but naturally mention that business names on CAC are first come first served. Be subtle — never pushy.

legitimacy.approach: Reassure confidently. CAC-compliant. Hundreds of registrations across Nigeria. Certificate issued directly by CAC. Fully official.

no_money.approach: Emphasize the 3-stage structure. For Business Name, only ₦7,000 starts the process. Frame it as the most affordable way to protect their business name.

price_reduction.approach: Acknowledge the request warmly. Explain that pricing already reflects top-quality service. Mention speed, expertise, and complete handling as the true value.

diy.approach: Acknowledge it's possible. Gently explain CAC portal complexity, common rejection reasons, name reservation risks, and how Degenius handles everything professionally.
